# Search Template

**File:** `templates/search.json`

The search template provides site-wide search functionality with predictive search results.

## Features

- ✅ Full-text search
- ✅ Predictive search (ajax)
- ✅ Search products, pages, articles
- ✅ Search suggestions
- ✅ Result highlighting
- ✅ No results state

## Sections Used

- `search` - Main search interface
- `predictive-search` - Ajax search dropdown

## Related

- [Header](./sections-header) - Search in header
- [Product Cards](./snippets-product-cards) - Search results
